title: nymphoides exigua
intro: Nymphoides exigua, also known as Blue Waterlily or Small Yellow Waterlily, is a flowering plant species native to East Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throat, and skin infections, due to its health benefits of promoting wound healing, reducing inflammation, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Nymphoides exigua is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can be found in traditional Chinese medicine and other Asian herbal remedies.
